segments.caption: The video opens with a dark, purple-hued title screen displaying the word 'Ökko' in white, followed by a fiery animation forming the word 'PHOENIX' with a stylized phoenix logo and the website 'phoenix-animation.com'. The scene transitions into a fast-paced montage of animated characters in various dynamic situations: a character with spiky hair holding a fan, a character with purple hair looking annoyed, a character with green hair making a heart gesture, and a chaotic scene with a blue car crashing through a wall. The montage culminates in a glowing '13 CARDS' title. The scene then shifts to a cozy, colorful living room where a character with teal hair peeks from behind a door, then walks into the room, picks up a blue remote, and turns on a retro TV showing a pixelated game. The character smiles, then sits on a pink couch as three other characters—two with yellow and green hair, and one with purple hair—appear, looking annoyed or unimpressed. The teal-haired character looks downcast, while the others maintain their expressions, suggesting a shift from excitement to tension.

segments.caption: The scene opens with a close-up of the Green-haired character, who has a mischievous grin and green spiral glasses, suggesting playful or sneaky intent. The camera then cuts to the Retro TV, which displays a pixelated game featuring a robot and a flower-like object, indicating a retro gaming theme. The Teal-haired character, initially cheerful, turns on the TV with the Blue remote and sits on the Pink couch, but soon appears dejected, possibly due to the game's outcome or an interruption. The Yellow-haired character leans on the couch with a neutral to slightly annoyed expression, while the Purple-haired character stands behind the couch with a stern, unimpressed look, holding the Blue remote. The Green-haired character then stands with a smug expression, raising a hand, possibly taunting or celebrating. The scene shifts to the kitchen area, where a new character with brown hair, wearing a yellow shirt with a black collar and blue pants, opens the refrigerator, revealing a mostly empty fridge with only a few items like an orange and a bowl of fruit. This character looks disappointed and then angry, possibly due to the lack of food. The scene returns to the living room, where the Purple-haired character and the Yellow-haired character are now standing, with the Purple-haired character still holding the Blue remote, and the Green-haired character and Teal-haired character are now sitting on the couch, with the Teal-haired character looking dejected. The overall atmosphere is one of mild tension and disappointment, with the characters' expressions and body language reflecting their emotions. The Living room remains brightly colored with orange walls and various decorations, including a dreamcatcher and a framed picture, maintaining a cozy yet slightly chaotic environment.

segments.caption: The video opens in a brightly colored living room where the Purple-haired character, holding the Blue remote, stands sternly behind the Pink couch, while the Teal-haired character sits dejectedly on it. The Yellow-haired character leans on the couch with a neutral expression. The Purple-haired character then uses the Blue remote to pour a dark liquid into a mug held by the Brown-haired character, who reacts with shock and disgust. The Brown-haired character then opens a refrigerator, only to find it empty, leading to a frustrated expression. He later appears angry, holding a piece of paper, possibly a note or receipt, while the Purple-haired character watches with a stern look. The scene shifts to the Brown-haired character standing in a doorway, looking distressed, as the Purple-haired character approaches with a stern expression. The Green-haired character enters, smirking and raising a hand, while the Yellow-haired character looks on with concern. The Brown-haired character then covers his face in despair. The scene transitions to a framed drawing titled 'Thirteen Cards,' showing various whimsical characters, with the Brown-haired character gesturing toward it. The Green-haired character then playfully points at the Brown-haired character, who looks annoyed. The Brown-haired character is then shown holding a sign that reads 'CARTOONS ARE COOL,' while the Green-haired character laughs. The Purple-haired character remains stern, holding the Blue remote, as the Brown-haired character smiles mischievously, holding a piece of paper and a backpack, suggesting a shift in mood or plan.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a blank sheet of paper surrounded by scattered colored pencils on a pink surface, setting a creative tone. The scene transitions to the Living room, where the Purple-haired character stands sternly behind the Pink couch, holding the Blue remote, while the Yellow-haired character leans on the couch with a neutral expression and the Teal-haired character sits dejectedly. The Green-haired character, standing with a smug look, raises a hand as if making a point. The Brown-haired character enters, reacting with shock to a dark liquid poured from the Blue remote into a mug, then later finds an empty refrigerator and holds a paper, showing frustration. The group gathers around a table, with the Green-haired character laughing and pointing playfully at the Yellow-haired character, who looks distressed. The Brown-haired character then holds up a sign reading 'CARTOONS ARE COOL,' adding a mischievous tone. The scene shifts to the Teal-haired character in the kitchen, looking distressed while holding a purple pencil. The video concludes with a series of illustrated panels: one showing construction site safety rules with the characters in hard hats, and another depicting a chaotic, surreal scene with exaggerated expressions and a speech bubble asking, 'Are we now in some alternative universe, where irony is king?' The final frame shows the group in a chaotic living room, with the Brown-haired character holding a phone and the Yellow-haired character crawling on the floor, while the Purple-haired character looks on sternly.

segments.caption: The video opens with a chaotic, surreal scene featuring multiple characters in exaggerated expressions, including the Teal-haired character looking distressed, the Green-haired character smirking, and the Yellow-haired character screaming, set against a backdrop of a framed drawing titled 'Thirteen Cards' and a panel labeled 'Construction site safety rules'. The scene abruptly shifts to a dark, intense moment where the Purple-haired character, now with glowing yellow eyes and a menacing expression, wields a sword amidst a swirling blue energy, suggesting a transformation or power surge. The setting then transitions to a brightly lit kitchen where the Purple-haired character, now back to normal, stands sternly with arms crossed while the Teal-haired character sits at the table, dejectedly holding a purple pencil and a blank sheet of paper. The Brown-haired character enters, holding a paper and looking frustrated, then later appears in a different room, holding a box of crayons and a ruler, seemingly overwhelmed by creative tasks. The scene cuts to a cluttered office space with a retro computer, books like 'Comics: Easy as ABC!' and 'Drawing Cartoons and Comics for Dummies', and a box labeled 'plasticine', indicating a creative or educational environment. The final scene returns to a living room where the Teal-haired character sits on the Pink couch, looking sad, while the Yellow-haired character, now holding a mug, appears annoyed and dismissive as the Teal-haired character shows them a drawing. The atmosphere shifts from surreal chaos to domestic tension, highlighting emotional struggles and creative frustration among the characters.

segments.caption: The video opens in a brightly colored living room with orange walls and a pink couch, where the Teal-haired character, wearing a brown scarf and tan shirt, appears distressed while holding a purple pencil and a blank sheet of paper. The Yellow-haired character, in a yellow shirt with a red emblem, initially screams in distress but then sits on the pink couch, holding a mug and looking annoyed. The Purple-haired character, with spiky purple hair and a dark blue shirt, appears menacing with glowing yellow eyes and a sword, then returns to a stern demeanor in the kitchen. The Green-haired character, with curly green hair and a blue shirt with a green spiral design, stands smugly, raising a hand, then laughs and points playfully. The scene shifts to a close-up of a tablet showing a character customization screen with a yellow-haired girl, followed by a shot of the Brown-haired character in a different room, standing with arms crossed, looking at a whiteboard with drawings. The Teal-haired character is then seen sitting dejectedly on the pink couch, while the Yellow-haired character leans on it, looking dismissive. The Green-haired character enters a room with a stack of papers, laughing, and begins drawing on a comic strip with a green pencil, adding details to a character's face. The final shot shows the Green-haired character smiling mischievously as they continue drawing, with the comic strip featuring a character with a surprised expression and a speech bubble saying 'Это что, коробка с призами?' (What is this, a box with prizes?).

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of the Green-haired character, who has curly green hair and wears a blue shirt with a green spiral design, smiling mischievously while holding a green pencil. The scene shifts to a dimly lit room where the Green-haired character is drawing on a comic strip, which features a character with a surprised expression and a speech bubble saying 'Это что, коробка с призами?' (What is this, a box with prizes?). The Yellow-haired character, with short yellow hair and a yellow shirt with a red emblem, is seen lying in bed, smiling contentedly. Suddenly, the scene cuts to a dramatic, stylized sequence where the Purple-haired character, with spiky purple hair and glowing yellow eyes, wields a sword in a dark, purple-hued environment, appearing menacing. This transitions to a kitchen setting where the Purple-haired character, now in a dark blue shirt, stands with arms crossed, smirking at the Teal-haired character, who has teal hair, wears a brown scarf and tan shirt, and looks distressed while holding a purple pencil and a blank sheet of paper. The Purple-haired character then playfully grabs the Teal-haired character’s hand, causing them to smile. The scene changes to a brightly lit living room with orange walls, where the Brown-haired character, with brown hair and wearing a yellow shirt with a black collar and blue pants, stands with arms crossed, looking at a whiteboard with drawings, while the Green-haired character, Yellow-haired character, and another character with brown hair and a striped shirt stand nearby. The Yellow-haired character is now sitting on the Pink couch, holding a mug and looking annoyed. The video then cuts to an outdoor scene where the Brown-haired character, now wearing a blue jacket with a fur-lined hood, looks shocked and distressed, clutching his chest. He is then shown walking through a cityscape, looking worried, before the final scene shows him in a park, where he is startled by a pigeon, while an elderly woman with gray hair and a red shawl smiles beside a bench with another pigeon.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Brown-haired character, wearing a yellow shirt with a black collar and blue pants, looking frustrated and clenching his fists in a room with orange walls. He confronts the Yellow-haired character, who is smiling while holding a tablet displaying a character customization screen. The Brown-haired character takes the tablet, and the Yellow-haired character’s expression shifts to surprise. The scene cuts to the Green-haired character, now wearing a blue shirt with a green spiral design, drawing on a comic strip with a mischievous grin, while the Brown-haired character watches with a stern expression. The scene shifts to a doorway where the Brown-haired character, now holding a stack of papers, stands between the Yellow-haired character and a new character with pink hair, both looking concerned. The Green-haired character reappears, waving dismissively. Suddenly, the Brown-haired character’s hand is shown with a pink, pixelated substance, which he drops, causing the papers to scatter. The Purple-haired character, now with glowing yellow eyes and a menacing expression, appears in the room, confronting the Brown-haired character. The scene transitions to a dark, stormy mountain landscape where the Purple-haired character, now in a purple armored suit, stands triumphantly with a sword, as a large, winged creature flies overhead. The scene cuts back to the room, where the Purple-haired character, now back in his dark blue shirt, glares at the Brown-haired character, who looks terrified. The Brown-haired character then holds a ruler and a box of crayons, looking overwhelmed in an office space with bookshelves and a whiteboard covered in drawings. The video ends with the Brown-haired character standing in a cityscape, wearing a blue jacket with a fur-lined hood, looking shocked and distressed as he walks through the gray, overcast urban environment.

segments.caption: The video opens with a tense interaction between the Purple-haired character, who has glowing yellow eyes and a stern expression, and the Brown-haired character, who appears surprised and defensive. The scene quickly shifts to a cluttered office space with orange walls, bookshelves, and a retro computer, where the Brown-haired character is now holding papers and engaging with a gray-haired character in a white shirt and tie, who is pointing at a bulletin board filled with notes, diagrams, and red string connecting various clues. The board includes labels like 'TEXT', 'SPIDER-BAT', 'FUM ETTO', and a yellow sticky note with Chinese characters '漫画' (màn huà, meaning 'comic'). The Brown-haired character gestures excitedly, explaining his theory, while the gray-haired character listens skeptically. The scene then shows the Brown-haired character placing a paper on a pink table, where a small, pink-haired character is drawing. The Brown-haired character then stands proudly in front of the board, addressing a group that includes the Purple-haired character, the Teal-haired character, the Yellow-haired character, and the Pink-haired character, who all react with varying degrees of shock, amusement, and concern. The Green-haired character appears behind them, holding a comic strip and smiling mischievously. The group gathers closely, with the Brown-haired character at the center, as the Green-haired character waves dismissively, suggesting a playful or sarcastic conclusion to the investigation. The atmosphere shifts from tense to chaotic and humorous, with exaggerated expressions and dynamic interactions among the characters.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a group of animated characters in a dimly lit room, displaying varied expressions of concern and surprise. The scene quickly shifts to a wider shot of a living room where a character with spiky purple hair and glowing yellow eyes stands menacingly, while others, including a teal-haired character and a yellow-haired character, react with fear. The focus then moves to a retro-style television screen showing a cartoonish scene of a gray-haired character and a yellow-haired character interacting in a simple, pastel-colored environment. The green-haired character, previously seen drawing a comic strip, suddenly leaps into the air in excitement, holding a purple object, as the TV displays a cheerful yellow-haired character. The scene cuts to a close-up of the purple-haired character, now with a stern expression, followed by a shot of the group on a pink couch, where the brown-haired character smiles confidently while the others look unimpressed. The video then transitions to black-and-white animated credits, showing a character sleeping in bed, then sitting up and giving a thumbs-up, with text identifying the director, author, and other production roles. The credits continue with stylized line drawings of characters and text listing voice actors, animators, and other crew members, including original and English voice actors, sound engineers, and background artists. The final frames display the production team’s names with accompanying doodles, ending with the 'RESTQUE TEAM' logo and a list of background artists, all set against a black background with white text and minimalistic character sketches.

segments.caption: The video segment transitions into a black-and-white animated credit sequence with a minimalist, hand-drawn aesthetic. On the left, a stylized character with spiky hair and a game controller-like object is shown leaning over a small bird with a question mark above it, suggesting curiosity or confusion. On the right, another character with spiky hair sits cross-legged, reading a book, with a thought bubble depicting a tropical island scene with a hammock and palm tree, indicating daydreaming or relaxation. Text appears sequentially in the center, listing production roles such as 'SELECTING TAKES', 'ASSISTANT CASTING DIRECTOR', 'SOUND EDITING', 'STUDIO ADMINISTRATION', and 'PRODUCERS FROM ÖKKO', with corresponding names. The sequence culminates in a heartfelt message: 'A big thank you to the entire '13 Cards' team!', written in a playful, handwritten font, accompanied by a small, joyful character with curly hair and hearts floating around, expressing gratitude. The scene fades to black, marking the end of the credits.
